title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 106.150 - Proceedings ex parte
text:
106.150.  Proceedings ex parte. — If the accused shall not appear after being notified, or, after appearing shall fail to answer, the court or commission may proceed ex parte.
(RSMo 1939 § 12845, A.L. 1945 p. 1319 § 12849) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11219; 1919 § 9192; 1909 § 10221
